acceptance_criteria.text: Telegram owner-bot recognizes refresh job follow-up requests.
Telegram can show recent refresh jobs with processing/completed/failed status, new review counts, and snippets.
proof: `_format_operator_refresh_jobs_text` renders statuses, counts, errors, and snippets.
Telegram copy tests cover the output.

acceptance_criteria.text: Telegram reviews menu exposes a status action for refresh jobs.
proof: `client_refresh_jobs` callback renders the refresh jobs text.

acceptance_criteria.text: The flow does not start parsing, bypass credits, publish replies, or write to external map providers.
proof: No enqueue, reserve, charge, provider write, or publish call was added.

acceptance_criteria.text: Docs and proof artifacts describe the Sprint 37 boundary.
proof: Updated Operator docs, agent index, and tool registry.

known_gaps: No live Telegram message was sent from this environment.
